title: Asking Someone Out on a First Date

all.en: For weeks, I had been thinking about asking Anna from my book club out on a date.
all.zh: 好幾個星期以來，我一直在考慮邀請讀書會的安娜出去約會。

all.en: She was smart, kind, and always had interesting opinions about the novels we discussed.
all.zh: 她聰明、善良，對我們討論的小說總是有獨到的見解。

all.en: Every time I tried to bring it up, my courage disappeared at the last second.
all.zh: 每次我試圖開口時，我的勇氣總在最後一刻消失。

all.en: My friends teased me and said I needed to take a chance before someone else did.
all.zh: 我的朋友們取笑我，說我得趁別人之前先試試看。

all.en: After our next meeting, I decided to walk her to the bus stop and finally speak up.
all.zh: 在下一次聚會後，我決定陪她走到公車站，並終於開口。

all.en: My hands were sweating and my voice trembled as I asked if she would like to have dinner.
all.zh: 當我問她是否願意一起吃晚餐時，我的手心冒汗、聲音顫抖。

all.en: To my surprise, she smiled brightly and said she had been hoping I would ask.
all.zh: 令我驚訝的是，她燦爛地笑了，並說她一直希望我會開口。

all.en: We chose a small Italian restaurant on a quiet street near the river.
all.zh: 我們選了一間位於河邊安靜街道上的小型義大利餐廳。

all.en: During the dinner, we discovered that we loved the same movies and shared similar dreams.
all.zh: 晚餐期間，我們發現我們喜歡相同的電影，也擁有相似的夢想。

all.en: The conversation flowed so naturally that two hours passed without either of us noticing.
all.zh: 對話進行得如此自然，兩個小時不知不覺就過去了。

all.en: As we said goodnight, we both agreed there should definitely be a second date soon.
all.zh: 當我們道晚安時，我們都同意應該儘快有第二次的約會。

all.en: On our second date, Anna chose a small jazz bar tucked behind a flower shop.
all.zh: 我們的第二次約會，安娜選了一間藏在花店後方的小型爵士酒吧。

all.en: We listened to a quiet trio and shared a plate of cheese and warm olives.
all.zh: 我們聽著一個安靜的三人樂團演奏，分享了一盤起司和溫熱的橄欖。

all.en: She told me about her childhood in the countryside and her dream of writing a novel.
all.zh: 她告訴我她在鄉下度過的童年，以及她想寫一本小說的夢想。

all.en: I shared old stories about my grandfather, who had taught me how to fish.
all.zh: 我則分享了我祖父的舊故事，他曾教我如何釣魚。

all.en: By the end of the month, we were exchanging book recommendations almost every night.
all.zh: 到了月底，我們幾乎每天晚上都在交換書籍推薦。

all.en: She introduced me to a French author whose words felt like a gentle conversation.
all.zh: 她向我介紹了一位法國作家，他的文字讀來如同一場溫柔的對話。

all.en: In return, I lent her a worn copy of my favorite mystery novel from college.
all.zh: 作為回報，我借給她一本我大學時最愛、已經有些破舊的推理小說。

all.en: On a sunny Saturday, we packed sandwiches and biked along the river together.
all.zh: 在一個陽光明媚的星期六，我們打包三明治，一起沿著河邊騎腳踏車。

all.en: As the months passed, my book club friends teased me about my constant smile.
all.zh: 幾個月過去，讀書會的朋友取笑我臉上始終掛著的微笑。

all.en: Asking her out had been frightening, but it became the best decision of my year.
all.zh: 開口邀她出去曾經令人害怕，卻成了我這一年最棒的決定。

all.en: Six months into our relationship, Anna invited me to meet her parents in the countryside.
all.zh: 我們交往六個月時，安娜邀我到鄉下與她的父母見面。

all.en: I bought a small bouquet of sunflowers and a box of pineapple cakes as gifts.
all.zh: 我買了一小束向日葵和一盒鳳梨酥作為見面禮。

all.en: Her father was a quiet fisherman who reminded me very much of my own grandfather.
all.zh: 她父親是一位安靜的漁夫，讓我聯想到我自己的祖父。

all.en: Her mother greeted me warmly and immediately fed me a huge bowl of homemade noodles.
all.zh: 她母親熱情地迎接我，立刻端上一大碗自製的湯麵。

all.en: After lunch, her father invited me to fish with him at a small lake nearby.
all.zh: 午餐後，她父親邀我一起到附近一座小湖邊釣魚。

all.en: We sat in silence for an hour before he quietly told me he approved of me.
all.zh: 我們靜靜坐了一個小時，他才輕聲告訴我，他認可我。

all.en: Anna squeezed my hand on the drive home and said her family rarely opened up so quickly.
all.zh: 回程的路上，安娜緊握我的手，說她家人很少這麼快敞開心房。

all.en: Months later, I introduced Anna to my own grandfather over a long Sunday lunch.
all.zh: 幾個月後，我也在一頓悠長的週日午餐中，把安娜介紹給我的祖父。

all.en: He shared his old fishing stories with her and gifted her his favorite wooden bookmark.
all.zh: 他與她分享了他古老的釣魚故事，並送給她一個他最愛的木製書籤。

all.en: Asking her out once had felt impossible, yet now our two families felt like one.
all.zh: 當初開口邀她出去曾感覺不可能，如今我們兩個家庭卻彷彿融為一家。

all.en: A year after meeting my grandfather, Anna and I rented a small apartment near a riverside park.
all.zh: 見過我祖父一年後，安娜和我在一座河濱公園附近租了一間小公寓。

all.en: We filled it with secondhand bookshelves and a single comfortable reading chair by the window.
all.zh: 我們在裡頭擺滿了二手書架，並在窗邊放了一張舒適的閱讀椅。

all.en: Every Sunday morning, we cooked breakfast together while listening to old jazz records softly.
all.zh: 每個星期天的早晨，我們在輕柔的舊爵士唱片聲中一起做早餐。

all.en: Anna finally began writing her novel at the kitchen table during quiet weekday evenings.
all.zh: 安娜終於在平日寧靜的傍晚，在廚房餐桌前開始書寫她的小說。

all.en: I read each chapter aloud and offered honest feedback while she nervously sipped her tea.
all.zh: 我朗讀每一章節，並提供真誠的回饋，而她則緊張地啜飲著茶。

all.en: Her book club friends gathered monthly in our living room to celebrate her growing manuscript.
all.zh: 她讀書會的朋友每月聚在我們的客廳，慶祝她日漸成形的手稿。

all.en: On her birthday, I quietly framed the first printed chapter and hung it above our desk.
all.zh: 在她生日那天，我悄悄地把第一份印刷出來的章節裱框，掛在我們的書桌上方。

all.en: She hugged me for a long time and whispered that home felt finally complete with me.
all.zh: 她久久地擁抱我，輕聲說有我在，家終於感覺完整了。

all.en: My grandfather visited that weekend and taught Anna how to clean and prepare a fresh fish.
all.zh: 我祖父那個週末來訪，並教安娜如何清理與處理一條新鮮的魚。

all.en: Asking her out once had taken every ounce of my courage, but love had quietly multiplied it.
all.zh: 當初鼓起所有勇氣才開口邀她出去，如今愛已悄悄地將那份勇氣加倍延展。

all.en: Anna's first novel was published the following autumn after three years of patient quiet writing.
all.zh: 安娜的第一本小說在三年耐心安靜的寫作後，於隔年秋天出版。

all.en: The launch was held at the small bookstore where her book club had welcomed me years ago.
all.zh: 新書發表會就在那間小書店舉辦，多年前她的讀書會曾在那裡接納了我。

all.en: I sat in the front row with her parents, my grandfather, and a small bouquet of sunflowers.
all.zh: 我和她的父母、我的祖父、一束小小的向日葵坐在第一排。

all.en: She read the dedication aloud, and I realized my own name was printed quietly on the page.
all.zh: 她大聲朗讀了致謝詞，我才發現自己的名字靜靜地印在那一頁。

all.en: Her father wiped his eyes silently while her mother held my grandfather's hand with gentle warmth.
all.zh: 她父親默默地擦拭眼角，而她母親則溫柔地握住我祖父的手。

all.en: Readers lined up patiently for signed copies, and Anna smiled at every single shy compliment.
all.zh: 讀者耐心地排隊等待簽名，安娜對每一句害羞的稱讚都報以微笑。

all.en: That night, we walked home along the river, holding her first printed novel close to her heart.
all.zh: 那晚，我們沿著河邊走回家，她把第一本印刷出版的小說緊緊抱在胸前。

all.en: She whispered that asking me out at the book club had quietly changed her entire life direction.
all.zh: 她輕聲說，當初在讀書會被我邀約，悄悄地改變了她整個人生的方向。

all.en: I held her hand and promised to keep walking beside her through every future chapter ahead.
all.zh: 我握住她的手，承諾會在未來的每一個篇章中繼續陪她並肩前行。

all.en: Love, I finally understood, simply means choosing courage gently every single ordinary day together.
all.zh: 我終於明白，愛就只是每一個平凡的日子裡，一起溫柔地選擇勇氣。
